component.name: hexo
component.description: A fast, simple & powerful blog framework, powered by Node.js.

component.name: abbrev
component.description: Like ruby's abbrev module, but in js

component.name: archy
component.description: render nested hierarchies `npm ls` style with unicode pipes

component.name: bluebird
component.description: Full featured Promises/A+ implementation with exceptionally good performance

component.name: chalk
component.description: Terminal string styling done right

component.name: ansi-styles
component.description: ANSI escape codes for styling strings in the terminal

component.name: color-convert
component.description: Plain color conversion functions

component.name: color-name
component.description: A list of color names and its values

component.name: supports-color
component.description: Detect whether a terminal supports color

component.name: has-flag
component.description: Check if argv has a specific flag

component.name: hexo-cli
component.description: Command line interface for Hexo

component.name: acorn
component.description: ECMAScript parser

component.name: chalk
component.description: Terminal string styling done right

component.name: ansi-styles
component.description: ANSI escape codes for styling strings in the terminal

component.name: color-convert
component.description: Plain color conversion functions

component.name: color-name
component.description: A list of color names and its values

component.name: escape-string-regexp
component.description: Escape RegExp special characters

component.name: supports-color
component.description: Detect whether a terminal supports color

component.name: has-flag
component.description: Check if argv has a specific flag

component.name: command-exists
component.description: check whether a command line command exists in the current environment

component.name: hexo-fs
component.description: File system module for Hexo.

component.name: chokidar
component.description: Minimal and efficient cross-platform file watching library

component.name: anymatch
component.description: Matches strings against configurable strings, globs, regular expressions, and/or functions

component.name: normalize-path
component.description: Normalize slashes in a file path to be posix/unix-like forward slashes. Also condenses repeat slashes to a single slash and removes and trailing slashes, unless disabled.

component.name: picomatch
component.description: Blazing fast and accurate glob matcher written in JavaScript, with no dependencies and full support for standard and extended Bash glob features, including braces, extglobs, POSIX brackets, and regular expressions.

component.name: braces
component.description: Bash-like brace expansion, implemented in JavaScript. Safer than other brace expansion libs, with complete support for the Bash 4.3 braces specification, without sacrificing speed.

component.name: fill-range
component.description: Fill in a range of numbers or letters, optionally passing an increment or `step` to use, or create a regex-compatible range with `options.toRegex`

component.name: to-regex-range
component.description: Pass two numbers, get a regex-compatible source string for matching ranges. Validated against more than 2.78 million test assertions.

component.name: is-number
component.description: Returns true if a number or string value is a finite number. Useful for regex matches, parsing, user input, etc.

component.name: glob-parent
component.description: Extract the non-magic parent path from a glob string.

component.name: is-glob
component.description: Returns `true` if the given string looks like a glob pattern or an extglob pattern. This makes it easy to create code that only uses external modules like node-glob when necessary, resulting in much faster code execution and initialization time, and a better user experience.

component.name: is-extglob
component.description: Returns true if a string has an extglob.

component.name: is-binary-path
component.description: Check if a file path is a binary file

component.name: binary-extensions
component.description: List of binary file extensions

component.name: readdirp
component.description: Recursive version of fs.readdir with streaming API.

component.name: escape-string-regexp
component.description: Escape RegExp special characters

component.name: graceful-fs
component.description: A drop-in replacement for fs, making various improvements.

component.name: hexo-log
component.description: Logger for Hexo

component.name: hexo-bunyan
component.description: a JSON logging library for node.js services(remove optional dependency DTrace-Provider for Hexo)

component.name: hexo-util
component.description: Utilities for Hexo.

component.name: camel-case
component.description: Transform into a string with the separator denoted by the next word capitalized

component.name: pascal-case
component.description: Transform into a string of capitalized words without separators

component.name: no-case
component.description: Transform into a lower cased string with spaces between words

component.name: lower-case
component.description: Transforms the string to lower case

component.name: tslib
component.description: Runtime library for TypeScript helper functions

component.name: cross-spawn
component.description: Cross platform child_process#spawn and child_process#spawnSync

component.name: path-key
component.description: Get the PATH environment variable key cross-platform

component.name: shebang-command
component.description: Get the command from a shebang

component.name: shebang-regex
component.description: Regular expression for matching a shebang line

component.name: which
component.description: Like which(1) unix command. Find the first instance of an executable in the PATH.

component.name: isexe
component.description: Minimal module to check if a file is executable.

component.name: deepmerge
component.description: A library for deep (recursive) merging of Javascript objects

component.name: highlight.js
component.description: Syntax highlighting with language autodetection.

component.name: htmlparser2
component.description: Fast & forgiving HTML/XML/RSS parser

component.name: domelementtype
component.description: all the types of nodes in htmlparser2's dom

component.name: domhandler
component.description: Handler for htmlparser2 that turns pages into a dom

component.name: domutils
component.description: Utilities for working with htmlparser2's dom

component.name: dom-serializer
component.description: render domhandler DOM nodes to a string

component.name: domhandler
component.description: Handler for htmlparser2 that turns pages into a dom

component.name: entities
component.description: Encode & decode XML and HTML entities with ease

component.name: prismjs
component.description: Lightweight, robust, elegant syntax highlighting. A spin-off project from Dabblet.

component.name: punycode.js
component.description: A robust Punycode converter that fully complies to RFC 3492 and RFC 5891, and works on nearly all JavaScript platforms.

component.name: strip-indent
component.description: Strip leading whitespace from each line in a string

component.name: min-indent
component.description: Get the shortest leading whitespace from lines in a string

component.name: striptags
component.description: PHP strip_tags in Node.js

component.name: minimist
component.description: parse argument options

component.name: resolve
component.description: resolve like require.resolve() on behalf of files asynchronously and synchronously

component.name: is-core-module
component.description: Is this specifier a node.js core module?

component.name: has
component.description: Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call shortcut

component.name: function-bind
component.description: Implementation of Function.prototype.bind

component.name: path-parse
component.description: Node.js path.parse() ponyfill

component.name: tildify
component.description: Convert an absolute path to a tilde path: `/Users/sindresorhus/dev` → `~/dev`

component.name: hexo-front-matter
component.description: Front-matter parser.

component.name: js-yaml
component.description: YAML 1.2 parser and serializer

component.name: argparse
component.description: Very powerful CLI arguments parser. Native port of argparse - python's options parsing library

component.name: sprintf-js
component.description: JavaScript sprintf implementation

component.name: esprima
component.description: ECMAScript parsing infrastructure for multipurpose analysis

component.name: hexo-i18n
component.description: i18n module for Hexo.

component.name: sprintf-js
component.description: JavaScript sprintf implementation

component.name: lodash
component.description: Lodash modular utilities.

component.name: micromatch
component.description: Glob matching for javascript/node.js. A replacement and faster alternative to minimatch and multimatch.

component.name: moment
component.description: Parse, validate, manipulate, and display dates

component.name: moment-timezone
component.description: Parse and display moments in any timezone.

component.name: nunjucks
component.description: A powerful templating engine with inheritance, asynchronous control, and more (jinja2 inspired)

component.name: a-sync-waterfall
component.description: Runs a list of async tasks, passing the results of each into the next one

component.name: asap
component.description: High-priority task queue for Node.js and browsers

component.name: commander
component.description: the complete solution for node.js command-line programs

component.name: pretty-hrtime
component.description: process.hrtime() to words

component.name: strip-ansi
component.description: Strip ANSI escape codes from a string

component.name: ansi-regex
component.description: Regular expression for matching ANSI escape codes

component.name: swig-extras
component.description: A collection of extra handy tags and filters for Swig Templates.

component.name: markdown
component.description: A sensible Markdown parser for javascript

component.name: nopt
component.description: Option parsing for Node, supporting types, shorthands, etc. Used by npm.

component.name: swig-templates
component.description: A simple, powerful, and extendable templating engine for node.js and browsers, similar to Django, Jinja2, and Twig.

component.name: optimist
component.description: Light-weight option parsing with an argv hash. No optstrings attached.

component.name: minimist
component.description: parse argument options

component.name: wordwrap
component.description: Wrap those words. Show them at what columns to start and stop.

component.name: uglify-js
component.description: JavaScript parser, mangler/compressor and beautifier toolkit

component.name: async
component.description: Higher-order functions and common patterns for asynchronous code

component.name: source-map
component.description: Generates and consumes source maps

component.name: uglify-to-browserify
component.description: A transform to make UglifyJS work in browserify.

component.name: yargs
component.description: Light-weight option parsing with an argv hash. No optstrings attached.

component.name: camelcase
component.description: Convert a dash/dot/underscore/space separated string to camelCase: foo-bar → fooBar

component.name: cliui
component.description: easily create complex multi-column command-line-interfaces

component.name: center-align
component.description: Center-align the text in a string.

component.name: align-text
component.description: Align the text in a string.

component.name: kind-of
component.description: Get the native type of a value.

component.name: is-buffer
component.description: Determine if an object is a Buffer

component.name: longest
component.description: Get the longest item in an array.

component.name: repeat-string
component.description: Repeat the given string n times. Fastest implementation for repeating a string.

component.name: lazy-cache
component.description: Cache requires to be lazy-loaded when needed.

component.name: right-align
component.description: Right-align the text in a string.

component.name: wordwrap
component.description: Wrap those words. Show them at what columns to start and stop.

component.name: decamelize
component.description: Convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator: unicornRainbow → unicorn_rainbow

component.name: window-size
component.description: Reliable way to to get the height and width of the terminal/console in a node.js environment.

component.name: text-table
component.description: borderless text tables with alignment

component.name: titlecase
component.description: Intelligently converting strings to title case (an enhanced fork of David Gouch's library)

component.name: warehouse
component.description: Simple JSON-based database

component.name: JSONStream
component.description: rawStream.pipe(JSONStream.parse()).pipe(streamOfObjects)

component.name: jsonparse
component.description: This is a pure-js JSON streaming parser for node.js

component.name: through
component.description: simplified stream construction

component.name: cuid
component.description: Collision-resistant ids optimized for horizontal scaling and performance. For node and browsers.

component.name: is-plain-object
component.description: Returns true if an object was created by the `Object` constructor.

component.name: rfdc
component.description: Really Fast Deep Clone

component.name: hexo-autoprefixer
component.description: Autoprefixer plugin for Hexo.

component.name: autoprefixer
component.description: Parse CSS and add vendor prefixes to CSS rules using values from the Can I Use website

component.name: browserslist
component.description: Share target browsers between different front-end tools, like Autoprefixer, Stylelint and babel-env-preset

component.name: caniuse-lite
component.description: A smaller version of caniuse-db, with only the essentials!

component.name: colorette
component.description: Easily set the color and style of text in the terminal.

component.name: electron-to-chromium
component.description: Provides a list of electron-to-chromium version mappings

component.name: escalade
component.description: A tiny (183B to 210B) and fast utility to ascend parent directories

component.name: node-releases
component.description: Node.js releases data

component.name: normalize-range
component.description: Utility for normalizing a numeric range, with a wrapping function useful for polar coordinates

component.name: num2fraction
component.description: Convert number to fraction

component.name: postcss
component.description: Tool for transforming styles with JS plugins

component.name: source-map
component.description: Generates and consumes source maps

component.name: supports-color
component.description: Detect whether a terminal supports color

component.name: postcss-value-parser
component.description: Transforms css values and at-rule params into the tree

component.name: minimatch
component.description: a glob matcher in javascript

component.name: brace-expansion
component.description: Brace expansion as known from sh/bash

component.name: balanced-match
component.description: Match balanced character pairs, like "{" and "}"

component.name: concat-map
component.description: concatenative mapdashery

component.name: hexo-deployer-git
component.description: Git deployer plugin of Hexo.

component.name: hexo-generator-archive
component.description: Archive generator for Hexo.

component.name: hexo-pagination
component.description: Pagination utilities for Hexo generator plugins.

component.name: hexo-generator-category
component.description: Category generator for Hexo.

component.name: hexo-generator-feed
component.description: Feed generator plugin for Hexo

component.name: hexo-generator-index
component.description: Index generator for Hexo.

component.name: hexo-generator-json-content
component.description: Hexo plugin to generate a JSON file with the contents of posts and pages to generic use or consumption, like AJAX site search, Twitter typehead or public content API

component.name: hexo-util
component.description: Utilities for Hexo.

component.name: highlight.js
component.description: Syntax highlighting with language autodetection.

component.name: htmlparser2
component.description: Fast & forgiving HTML/XML parser

component.name: keyword-extractor
component.description: Module for creating a keyword array from a string and excluding stop words.

component.name: hexo-generator-search
component.description: Seach generator plugin for Hexo

component.name: utils-merge
component.description: merge() utility function

component.name: hexo-generator-seo-friendly-sitemap
component.description: SEO-friendly sitemap generator plugin for Hexo

component.name: bluebird
component.description: Full featured Promises/A+ implementation with exceptionally good performance

component.name: ejs
component.description: Embedded JavaScript templates

component.name: lodash
component.description: Lodash modular utilities.

component.name: moment
component.description: Parse, validate, manipulate, and display dates

component.name: pretty-data
component.description: plugin to pretty-print or minify XML, JSON, CSS and SQL files

component.name: url-join
component.description: Join urls and normalize as in path.join.

component.name: hexo-generator-tag
component.description: Tag generator for Hexo.

component.name: hexo-image-caption
component.description: add caption for images within posts

component.name: hexo-inject
component.description: Dynamic script & style (and more) injection for Hexo

component.name: babel-plugin-transform-decorators-legacy
component.description: A plugin for Babel 6 that (mostly) replicates the old decorator behavior from Babel 5.

component.name: babel-plugin-syntax-decorators
component.description: Allow parsing of decorators

component.name: babel-runtime
component.description: babel selfContained runtime

component.name: core-js
component.description: Standard library

component.name: regenerator-runtime
component.description: Runtime for Regenerator-compiled generator and async functions.

component.name: babel-template
component.description: Generate an AST from a string template.

component.name: babel-traverse
component.description: The Babel Traverse module maintains the overall tree state, and is responsible for replacing, removing, and adding nodes

component.name: babel-code-frame
component.description: Generate errors that contain a code frame that point to source locations.

component.description: Terminal string styling done right. Much color.

component.description: Check if a string has ANSI escape codes

component.description: utility box for ECMAScript language tools

component.description: A regex that tokenizes JavaScript.

component.name: babel-messages
component.description: Collection of debug messages used by Babel.

component.name: babel-types
component.description: Babel Types is a Lodash-esque utility library for AST nodes

component.name: to-fast-properties
component.description: Force V8 to use fast properties for an object

component.description: A JavaScript parser

component.description: small debugging utility

component.description: Tiny milisecond conversion utility

component.name: globals
component.description: Global identifiers from different JavaScript environments

component.name: invariant
component.description: invariant

component.name: loose-envify
component.description: Fast (and loose) selective `process.env` replacer using js-tokens instead of an AST

component.name: babel-polyfill
component.description: Provides polyfills necessary for a full ES2015+ environment

component.name: regenerator-runtime
component.description: Runtime for Regenerator-compiled generator and async functions.

component.name: core-decorators
component.description: Library of ES2016 (ES7) JavaScript decorators inspired by languages that come with built-ins like @​override, @​deprecate, @​autobind, @​mixin and more! Works great with React/Angular/more!

component.name: underscore
component.description: JavaScript's functional programming helper library.

component.description: Add math support to hexo

component.name: html-entities
component.description: Faster HTML entities encode/decode library.

component.description: Fast math typesetting for the web.

component.description: An optimised way to copy'ing an object. A small and simple integration

component.description: Encode a URL to a percent-encoded form, excluding already-encoded sequences

component.description: Escape string for use in HTML

component.description: return the first event in a set of ee/event pairs

component.description: parse a url with memoization

component.name: unpipe
component.description: Unpipe a stream from all destinations

component.description: node.js basic auth parser

component.description: Deprecate all the things

component.name: open
component.description: Open stuff like URLs, files, executables. Cross-platform.

component.description: Check if the process is running inside Windows Subsystem for Linux (Bash on Windows)

component.name: serve-static
component.description: Serve static files

component.description: Better streaming static file server with Range and conditional-GET support

component.name: depd
component.description: Deprecate all the things

component.name: destroy
component.description: destroy a stream if possible

component.name: etag
component.description: Create simple HTTP ETags

component.name: fresh
component.description: HTTP response freshness testing

component.name: http-errors
component.description: Create HTTP error objects

component.name: setprototypeof
component.description: A small polyfill for Object.setprototypeof

component.description: Convert a string of words to a JavaScript identifier

component.name: ms
component.description: Tiny millisecond conversion utility

component.name: range-parser
component.description: Range header field string parser

component.description: Hexo tag plugin to embed a Youtube player that auto resizes with your responsive layout

component.name: node
component.description: node

component.name: glob
component.description: a little globber

component.name: make-dir
component.description: Make a directory and its parents if needed - Think `mkdir -p`

component.name: pify
component.description: Promisify a callback-style function

component.name: mv
component.description: fs.rename but works across devices. same as the unix utility 'mv'

component.name: ncp
component.description: Asynchronous recursive file copy utility.

component.name: rimraf
component.description: A deep deletion module for node (like `rm -rf`)

component.name: native-request
component.description: A simple package with no dependencies for native requests using callback

component.name: prr
component.description: A better Object.defineProperty()

component.name: safe-json-stringify
component.description: Prevent defined property getters from throwing errors

component.name: errno
component.description: libuv errno details exposed

component.name: image-size
component.description: get dimensions of any image file
